scripts.test:php:setup: wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/wp-admin-assistant && composer install'
scripts.test:php: wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/wp-admin-assistant && vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist'
scripts.test:php:integration: wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/wp-admin-assistant && vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist --testsuite integration'
